# github_project (Resource)

This resource creates and manages a GitHub Projects V2 project owned by an organization or user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "github_project" "planning" {
  owner_type        = "organization"
  title             = "Planning"
  short_description = "Organization planning"
  public            = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) Title of the project.

### Optional

- `closed` (Boolean) Whether the project is closed.
- `owner` (String) Login of the project owner. Defaults to the provider owner.
- `owner_type` (String) Type of project owner. Must be `organization` or `user`.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether the project is public.
- `readme` (String) README content of the project.
- `short_description` (String) Short description of the project.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `number` (Number) Project number scoped to the owner.
- `url` (String) URL of the project.

## Import

Projects can be imported using their GraphQL node ID:

```shell
terraform import github_project.example PVT_kwDOExample
```
